name: openpolis-workspace
description: A lightweight governance operating system for political organizations, local governments, and civic institutions
author: OpenPolis Contributors

scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm exec eslint packages scripts --ext .js,.mjs,.ts,.tsx,.mts,.cts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/domain/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/governance/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/application/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/i18n/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: tsx --test --test-isolation=none apps/web/tests/action-errors.test.ts apps/web/tests/actor-context.test.ts apps/web/tests/input-validation.test.ts apps/web/tests/operator-route-guard.test.ts apps/web/tests/operator-session.test.ts apps/web/tests/read-governance.test.ts apps/web/tests/request-security.test.ts apps/web/tests/security-headers.test.ts apps/web/tests/server-command-context.test.ts apps/web/tests/workflow-smoke.test.ts packages/application/tests/workflow-service.test.ts packages/contracts/tests/primitives.test.ts packages/db/tests/workspace-migration.test.ts packages/domain/tests/events.test.ts packages/governance/tests/policies.test.ts
